title: GroovyModLoader (GML)
description: NeoForge language provider for Groovy mods.
body:
Used to make NeoForge mods with the Groovy programming language. Works by JiJ'ing the Groovy libraries, providing GMLLangProvider to load `@GMod` object declarations.

Included Groovy modules:
stdlib, contracts, datetime, nio, macro, macro-library, templates, typecheckers, dateutil, ginq, toml, json.

For modders, see the project [README](https://github.com/GroovyMC/GroovyModLoader/blob/1.21.x/README.MD) on how to use GML. For users, just install the mod in the mods folder.
